intro: This Product User Manual (PUM) serves as a comprehensive guide for utilising the Copernicus High-Resolution Layer Small Landscape Features (HRL SLF) product for the 2021 reference year. It provides detailed definitions and product specifications, focusing on woody vegetation mapping, encompassing forested areas, trees outside forests, and urban trees. The document is designed for a wide range of users, from operational practitioners and decision-makers to general users, offering essential information on product characteristics, quality indicators, and usage guidelines. The manual emphasises practical application and accessibility, ensuring users can effectively integrate HRL SLF data into their workflows.
